caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses, wearing a light green embroidered blouse and a dark necklace, speaks against a solid dark background. She is the sole person present, gesturing with her hands to emphasize her points. In the early part of the sequence, her hands are raised and open as she speaks. As the scene progresses, she lowers her hands, with her right hand moving toward her chest and her left hand resting near her waist. Finally, she raises both hands again in a wide, expressive gesture. A small logo with the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene throughout the sequence. The camera remains stationary, focusing on the woman from the waist up, capturing her facial expressions and hand movements as she talks.
